query:
SELECT id, customerId, createdAt, acceptedAt, deliveredAt, deliveryDuration, status
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL AND DATE(deliveredAt) = '2026-02-07'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT id, customerId, createdAt, acceptedAt, deliveredAt, deliveryDuration, status
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL AND DATE(deliveredAt) = '2026-02-07'
LIMIT 5;
